reviews.review_title: Love it! Need it for Quest 2
reviews.review_description: I love this app. Please also make it for Quest 2.
this was a good card game would like to play this after a beat  saber game on the quest
Would love a spider solitaire game
If you like playing solitaire you will love this great graphics highly recomended if you like cards
So simple but easy to play
Great vr solitaire. Love it. It only needs vr controller support.
Love the game but since the update my headset has been getting hot & I've had to turn it off to cool down. Has anyone else had this problem? Are you planning on other games? Would love spider.

developer_response.body:
Hello! We haven't had any other reports on this problem so far. It sounds like this is due to the update on your device which we unfortunately can't help with. If you want to share more information about what update and what version you're on now, please send us an email at support@resolutiongames.com.

We currently don't have any news about other card games but we have released several new games to other VR devices. You can check them all out here: https://www.resolutiongames.com/games

reviews.review_description: Found myself getting distracted by the fireplace sound switching ears from left to right when looking left to right. Otherwise a wonderful atmospheric solitaire game!

reviews.review_title: You will play this game more than others
reviews.review_description: This is a 2D game set in a 3D environment. But like Tetris Effect some games are enhanced by  playing in the distraction free environment of VR. So over the period of one year I've actually logged many hours playing this game.

I've never had a problem seeing any other VR app, but this one hurts my eyes really bad. It uses a weird field of view that feels like everything is zoomed in, to the point that I feel like I'm going cross eyed just to focus. You CAN eventually focus but it puts alot of strain on my eyes unlike any other VR app. Shame because it looks like it could be great.

developer_response.body:
Hi Kinotsu,

Thanks for your feedback. We have fixed a problem related to an Oculus update, which produced a lot of strain for the eyes. You're welcome back to try again!

reviews.review_description: Needs an option to change the skill level. Very easy to beat. Maybe also an option to change the pictures to ones out of your gallery

Found myself playing this game a lot more than I would have expected, and really enjoyed it. Wish the little guy would talk or cheer if u win or something. Maybe some new scenery options and different solitaires like spider solitaire would be cool. Would love if your company did crazy 8s or go fish multiplayer...

I have a number of VR games but I ultimately come back to this one. It opens up in a comfy library with a cozy fireplace and an old-timey radio on a desk. A tiny jester directs you to gaze at a stack of cards until they unfurl in the air above the desk. Next to the radio is a green back button to go back one card move (or more moves if you keep pressing) and a red start-over button. Behind your left shoulder is a big red chair that I dream about sinking into. Game play is effortless, no hands required. Just stare at the card you want to move and it automatically moves to the right place. 

If I had to suggest improvements I would wish for two things. One, the cards on the desk are very low. When I play I'm already half reclined in the bed which means I'm digging my chin into my chest to engage the deck. Second, I really do like the soft jazz that the radio plays but oh how I wish I could access Pandora somehow. I would love to play some classical Christmas music right about now. 

I hope there are more relaxing games like this for vr. Not every game must have cliffs and whirls and some of us really appreciate these games. 

Oh one more thing... I find that the game has a tendency to drift to the left and by the time I've played a few games, my body has turned around by 180°.  I don't know if this is an Oculus thing or a game thing.  

The graphics are gorgeous, not bright and cartoony but rich colors like burgundy, leather and wood. I highly recommend it, and this is the first time I've ever left a review for a game.

Thank you for your help. Its all better now. This is fun. Solitaire has a very special place for me. My grandparents taught us kids how to play solitaire. I  got it. Now it turns one card. The little guy is so cute. 12/28/2019 I love the new additions new card backs. It also a book that let's us choose more games. I'm not sure if you can give Jester the ability to say hello or talk, that would be so Awesome. I find this game so relaxing.. Jester is so cute. Nice Job. Thank you. Oh, could you give Jester a chair closer to where he used too sit? Thank you. This is so tharaputic for me. A nice quiet environment. You did a wonderful job on this app. This deserves more than 5 stars. I enjoy this so much and Jester is so cute. I also have Wonderglade. Lots of fun. Great job, Thank you. I saw this lady's review  where she turns off the sound and plays her own music.  I'm wondering if the radio on the table in the game could be changed to some how bring in our own music. where it could play our music. You guys are pretty clever.  You'll think of something. I love your games. I found out that the Oculus Go is being discontinued.  I also want always have your Solitaire Jester.  Could make A Quest version so that I'll always have it? Thank goodness I bought your Angry Birds for my Quest.  Also your Wonderglades app is so much fun. I'd really love to see your Go platform games on the Oculus Quest platform. 
You all make such fun games. Thank you for all your hard work. 👍🌹❤ Did you know that there’s a drop down menu where you change the headset when I change this too Go I see compatible apps. Could you make solitaire Jester compatible this way? If something were too happen with my oculus Go I wouldn’t be able to play my Solitaire Jester anymore. Could you make this compatible with Quest 3? I've kept my Oculus Go because it has this app on it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words! We'll definitely keep your suggestion in mind for the future. :)

We're so happy to receive these heart-warming words!

Edit: We've noted your new suggestions. Thank you once again for playing.

Edit 2: Hopefully we can bring out more of our Go games to the Quest in the future. Unfortunately we can't promise anything right now, but we'll have to wait and see what happens in the future. :)

reviews.review_description: This is a good solitaire game. It is very relaxing and can be challenging at the same time. Has a few different card decks to use in game. Otherwise,  it's your basic solitaire. Good for a change on normal games and has a nice background. I recommend.

Just found this gem.
Great relaxing APP
Super cool love it
Besides the game i really love the ambient with the fireplace and the jazz music. It's like my own private happy chill out relaxing room.

The company that makes this has quite rudely told me that they're not even going to think about updating this game with more content or offering support for the controller.  They couldn't care less about their userbase and all their games should be pulled from the market.
Nice 5 stars to you all that made this game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we really appreciate it!
